title: inputs
description: The design contract: what the converter must achieve (designRequirements) and the explicit operating points at which it must be evaluated (operatingPoints).

operatingPoints.description: Explicit (Vin, Iout_per_rail, Tamb) tuples at which the converter must be evaluated. Each entry corresponds 1:1 with COAS.outputs[i]. Mirrors MAS/inputs/operatingPoint shape so a TAS simulator can consume them directly.

name.description: Human-readable label for this operating point (e.g. 'nom-line full-load 25C').

inputVoltage.description: DC input voltage in V. For AC inputs, use rmsInputVoltage instead.

rmsInputVoltage.description: RMS input voltage in V (AC sources).

outputCurrents.description: Per-rail load currents in A; ordering matches designRequirements.outputs[].

dutyProfile.description: Optional duty profile name for time-varying loads (e.g. 'mission-A', 'pulse-50pct').
